notes.max_stretch_error: Maximum relative stretch of any spring (|len - rest| / rest). 1.5 = 150% stretch tolerance for basic mass-spring. Use 0.05 for PBD.
notes.max_ground_penetration_depth: Maximum depth a particle can penetrate below ground plane (in world units).
notes.max_sphere_penetration_depth: Maximum depth a particle can penetrate inside the collision sphere.
notes.max_energy_growth_ratio: Total energy at any step should not exceed this ratio of initial energy.
notes.nan_inf_allowed: If true, simulation passes even with NaN/Inf values (not recommended).
